title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Gets Cyberspace Makeover
summary: Showcase CodeGrind's cyberpunk-coded towers and AI-assisted DSA practice, highlighting the Code Breach vibe and new AI enhancements without overhyping.
core_message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style problems with an AI-assisted teaching layer and a cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic. Real-time editor, Azure OpenAI guidance, and upcoming gameplay polish make practicing data structures feel interactive and visual.
cta: Try a guided practice session today and see how AI hints integrate with problem solving in CodeGrind.
visual_brief: Static image showing CodeGrind interface with code editor on one side and a cyberpunk tower-defense visualization (towers labeled with ForLoop, IfCondition, Variable, Function) attacking code snippets, neon glow, and subtle GitHub/Azure OpenAI branding; include a small banner stating AI-assisted problem solving.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

reddit_subreddit.title: CodeGrind: DSA Practice Gets Cyberspace Makeover
reddit_subreddit.text: CodeGrind brings LeetCode-style DSA practice into a cyberpunk, AI-assisted environment. The new interface pairs a live editor with a tower-defense visualization to show how concepts like ForLoop, IfCondition, and Function interact in real time. Check out a guided practice session and see the AI hints in action at https://codegrind.online
